title: problem with geographic query
description:
Hi,
when I do a geographic query using st_distance, I get the following error
"Virtuoso VECSL Error VECSL: Geo chekc ro id is to be a vec ssl.  For support."
what does it mean?
Thanks,
Pierfrancesco
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE parking_spots (id UInt32, label String, geometry String, is_crowdsourced UInt8, project_id UInt32);
INSERT INTO parking_spots (id, label, geometry, is_crowdsourced, project_id) VALUES (1, 'Spot A', 'POINT(7.5 45.2)', 1, 101);
INSERT INTO parking_spots (id, label, geometry, is_crowdsourced, project_id) VALUES (2, 'Spot B', 'POINT(8.0 45.0)', 0, 102);
SELECT id, label FROM parking_spots WHERE geoDistance(geometry, 'POINT(7.8 45.1)') < 1000;
ALTER TABLE parking_spots UPDATE is_crowdsourced = 0 WHERE id = 1;
key_bug_features: Error during geographic query using st_distance function
